scripts.build: pnpm build:daemon-sidecar && pnpm -C apps/desktop build && pnpm -C apps/desktop tauri build
scripts.check:rust: pnpm check:rust-deps && pnpm build:daemon-sidecar && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo check --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo test -p jyowo-harness-memory --features testing --test store_audit && cargo test -p jyowo-harness-tool --features builtin-toolset --test memory_tool && cargo test -p jyowo-harness-sdk --features testing memory_tool_response_preserves_action_plan_id
scripts.check:frontend:fast: pnpm -C apps/desktop typecheck && pnpm -C apps/desktop lint && pnpm -C apps/desktop test
scripts.check:rust:fast: pnpm check:daemon-sidecar && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test -p jyowo-harness-contracts -p jyowo-desktop-shell
scripts.check:quick: pnpm check:release-version && pnpm check:release-workflow && pnpm check:tauri-updater && pnpm check:tauri-window && pnpm check:test-architecture && pnpm check:tauri-command-registration && pnpm check:no-legacy-conversation-surface && pnpm check:agent-orchestration-no-fakes && pnpm check:daemon-agent-capability-boundary && pnpm check:design-tokens && pnpm check:daemon-sidecar && pnpm check:frontend:fast && pnpm check:rust:fast
scripts.check: pnpm check:release-version && pnpm check:release-workflow && pnpm check:tauri-updater && pnpm check:tauri-window && pnpm check:test-architecture && pnpm check:tauri-command-registration && pnpm check:no-legacy-conversation-surface && pnpm check:agent-orchestration-no-fakes && pnpm check:daemon-agent-capability-boundary && pnpm check:daemon-sidecar && pnpm check:desktop && pnpm check:tool-network-broker-boundary && pnpm check:rust
